creator: marcel@herrbischoff.com
text:
Here's the output from a failed update attempt via portmaster:

===>  Cleaning for libzen-0.7.99

fetch: http://mediaarea.net/download/binary/mediainfo/0.7.99/MediaInfo_CLI_0.7.99_GNU_FromSource.tar.xz: size mismatch: expected 2802740, actual 2793892

make: stopped in /usr/ports/multimedia/libzen
